# Shavkatov Fayzulloh

> SEO, AEO, and GEO consultant in Tashkent, Uzbekistan helping small and medium businesses grow through Google search and AI-powered search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews). Founder of Darslinker.uz.

Shavkatov Fayzulloh Furqat o'g'li applies the same SEO/AEO/GEO playbook he tests on his own startup (Darslinker.uz) to client work. 3+ years of project management experience in IT and marketing. Content is published in Uzbek (primary) and English (secondary).

## Specializations

- **SEO (Search Engine Optimization):** Technical SEO, content strategy, local SEO for the Uzbek market, Google Business Profile optimization
- **AEO (Answer Engine Optimization):** Content structuring for citations in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews
- **GEO (Generative Engine Optimization):** Content strategies for generative AI engines
- **Project Management:** Systematic execution of digital growth projects

## Services

- SEO/AEO audits for SMBs
- Search visibility growth across Google and AI engines
- Founder consultation on content and technical SEO
- Custom SEO/AEO playbooks based on Darslinker.uz learnings

## Site

- [Homepage](https://shavkatov.io): SEO/AEO/GEO consultancy positioning and overview
- [About](https://shavkatov.io/about): Background, approach, and credentials
- [Services](https://shavkatov.io/services): SEO and AEO service packages with scope and deliverables
- [Blog](https://shavkatov.io/blog): SEO/AEO insights, case studies, and industry news in Uzbek and English

## Contact

- [Telegram](https://t.me/shavkatov_ff): Primary channel for inquiries and consultations
- [Instagram](https://instagram.com/shavkatov.io): Updates, content, and behind-the-scenes

## Content Approach

The blog publishes across five rotating content types: educational fundamentals (SEO/AEO basics and advanced), service CTAs (funneling to consultations), niche-specific guides (clinics, e-commerce, marketing agencies, local businesses), personal cases from Darslinker.uz experiments, and translated industry news for the Uzbek market.

Every post is AEO-optimized with a TL;DR upfront, FAQ sections with schema markup, citation-friendly structure, and sources for all claims.
